description: The updated Alpha Breeze features lighter-weight, tear-resistant ripstop materials for the rainfly and inner tent, resulting in an overall weight reduction of 2.2 lbs. The material is made without intentionally added PFAS-based treatments and is designed to meet or exceed leading chemical safety standards. Designed specifically for the North American camper, the architecture of the Alpha Breeze is inspired by traditional A-frames and Adirondack cabins. The tent features convenient entry points on all four sides, offering added ventilation, and color-coordinated pieces for simple set-up. The Alpha Breeze provides ample living space, and the vestibule can be converted into an awning for an extended gathering area. Please note: The Alpha Breeze was updated on September 18th, 2025.

description: The Alpha Breeze Tent Set is a 2-piece camping set inclusive of the Alpha Breeze and its Mat & Sheet Set . Designed for family camping, the Alpha Breeze comfortably sleeps four people and offers an external gathering space with an extendable front flap. Use the mat and sheet within the tent for added sleeping comfort and insulation.

description: The Amenity Dome 2 is a Japanese-designed 2-person tent offering easy setup and high functionality. Based on the original Amenity Dome design, this version features a natural earth-tone color and incorporates a variety of functional updates. The Amenity Dome 2 features a symmetrical vestibule with arched doors on either side, and a front door with side panels for weather resistance when used as an awning. Using an updated outer frame structure, the poles are inserted into the rainfly, allowing the tent to be used as a simple shelter. The inner tent is attached with clips to the inside of the rainfly, allowing the user to remain dry while setting it up. The rainfly features triangular mesh panels on either side for enhanced ventilation.

description: The Amenity Dome Medium in Ivory is a Japanese-designed four-person tent. Use during outdoor excursions for a comfortable sleeping and living space. The Amenity Dome Medium in Ivory has undergone rigorous testing to ensure top performance in 3-season weather conditions. It features an outer vestibule, a removable rainfly, ample ventilation, color-coordinated pieces for simple set-up, and side pockets for storage. Pair the Amenity Dome Medium in Ivory with the Take! Chair and My Table for a relaxing set-up. Check out our tent care tutorial for expert advice.

description: Made in Japan, the Renewed Long Folding Shelf offers multi-use bamboo surface supported by aluminum legs. Now in an updated finish, use the Renewed Long Folding Shelf as a narrow table, bench or storage space. Intended for use in camp or the home, the Renewed Long Folding Shelf can be set-up by simply attaching the legs to the benchtop by inserting into notches. Pair the Renewed Long Folding Shelf with the Single Action Table Large .

description: The Campfield Futon Starter Set epitomizes Japanese design and functionality. Use the futon as a bed, two individual chairs with the third portion as a table, or three separate stacking shelves. Pack it up and take it camping, use it on your patio or in your living room. The Campfield Futon Starter Set includes two natural wood armrests for added style, plus three base pieces, backrest, and seat cushions.

description: The Connection Table is a versatile, low-height, table. Made from stainless steel and treated with a fire-resistant coating, the Connection Table can be used as a table, shelf, or bench. The table is compatible with most IGT Extensions using Low Height Legs , and can be connected with the Jikaro Firering Table to create an extended fire-safe table space.

description: Featuring a stainless steel body and washable canvas cover, the Dog Cot is modeled after the Low Beach Chair. Use the comfortable, elevated Dog Cot for your furry companion, then fold it up for easy storage. Pair the Dog Cot with the Dog Cushion for extra comfort. The Dog Cot supports dogs up to 33 lbs in size.

description: The Down System Ofuton & Slim Mat is an adjustable comforter and mattress system designed in the style of a Japanese futon, with added functionality for improved comfort at camp. The comforter is filled with warm down and features six connection points for securing it to the mat, allowing the comforter to remain fixed in place for a comfortable night's sleep. Flaps on each side can be folded under before securing the straps, and a drawstring closure at the top of the bag can be tightened to maximize heat retention. The flaps can be secured at four points, on the top and bottom, for enhanced warmth and comfort.

description: Designed with space for the whole family, the Entry Pack Tent & Tarp is the ideal set for any outdoor adventure. The Entry Pack Tent & Tarp combines the Vault Tent with the Amenity Tarp Hexa for the ultimate car camping set-up. With space for four, the tent and tarp can be used together as a full set or separated for additional modularity. Use the tent for sleeping, and the tarp area for gathering and cooking. The tent’s arch frame consists of color-coded pieces to ensure easy setup for first-time use. The compact tarp acts as a shade on warm days and shelter from unexpected rain or wind. Pair the Entry Pack Tent & Tarp with the Entry Pack TT Mat & Sheet Set for additional comfort and protection.

description: The Extension IGT is a two-unit expandable Iron Grill Table. The table has a minimalistic design that does not require any connection tools or extension pieces. The Extension IGT features two laminated bamboo tabletops and an aluminum alloy stand. To use, slide each side of the bamboo to their respective opposite sides and insert a stove in the middle. Pair the Extension IGT with the Double Burner Stove for a complete cooking set-up. burn Please note, the Extension IGT cannot be used with any BBQ Boxes or the Grill Burner.

description: The Folding Chair Leg Cap Set adds traction and floor protection to the legs of the Folding Chair, allowing it to be used indoors. The material is made from a combination of hard and soft plastics for grip and durability, while the shape is designed to prevent the caps from slipping off accidentally.

description: Crafted of ultra-durable itauba wood, the Garden Table Bench is the ideal seating companion for the Garden Table. Itauba is known for its density and rot resistance, making it an ideal material for outdoor decking and furniture. Thin wood slats create a comfortable seating surface that can be used indoors or on a patio. Pair with the Garden Table for a complete set-up.

description: Designed to create a beautiful backyard IGT experience, the Garden Unit Table Set includes the Garden Unit Table and four wood inserts. Both the table and inserts are crafted from durable Itauba Wood, known for its density and rot resistance, making it an ideal material for outdoor decking and furniture. Sturdy stainless steel legs and frame complete the foundation. The Garden Unit Table Set is designed to comfortably seat 4-6 with 4 units of IGT space in the center. Insert the included Wood Inserts to fill 4 units of space or add compatible cooking or storage accessories. Pair with the Garden Table Bench for a complete outdoor set.

Use the bench for comfortably seating two adults or to store personal belongings or luggage. The Gray Folding Bench folds flat for easy storage when not in use. Pair the Gray Folding Bench with the Gray Folding Chair for a cohesive look.

description: The HD Para Tarp is a three-pole tarp with a new innovative design. The tarp features an elevated front for easy entry, while the center section is optimal for seated gatherings. The structure of the tarp funnels rainwater toward the outer corners, protecting campers from the elements. The HD Para Tarp is comprised of waterproof fabric that also provides UV protection. Pair the tarp with the Red Lounge Set for a protected gathering experience. Please note: Wing Poles are not included and need to be purchased separately.

description: The HD Tarp Shield Hexa Evo Pro is a Japanese-designed tarp made of Snow Peak Shield Material. The easy-to-set-up tarp requires only two poles and six stakes to create a central gathering space in the campsite. The elegant shape combines innovative design with the functionality to house multiple tents and living areas underneath. Please note: Wing Poles are not included. For use during Takibi Time, pair with the fire-resistant Hexa Evo Takibi Inner Tarp.

description: The IGT Slim is a modern Iron Grill Table. The slim is made of teak wood that is highly weather resistant. The IGT Slim features six wood panels, frame with 2 foldable legs, and a carrying case. Use it in the home, garden or campsite for a cooking or dining space. Remove any of the six wood panels to insert a stovetop or use as a workspace. Pair the IGT Slim with the Low Beach Chair or inserts from our Iron Grill Table series.

description: Constructed with advanced materials for increased performance, the Land Breeze Pro. 1 is part of the enhanced Land Breeze dome tent series. Designed to comfortably accommodate two people, the Land Breeze Pro. 1 is wind-resistant and able to withstand year-round weather. The tent has a side vestibule entry, wall pockets for storage and color-coordinated poles for a simplified set-up. The Land Breeze series features enhanced room temperature control due to mesh skylights with zippered closures, advanced panels and mud skirt design that encourage air flow. Pair the Land Breeze Pro. 1 with the Land Breeze Pro. 1 Ground Sheet and Land Breeze Pro. 1 Inner Mat for additional protection.

description: The Japanese-designed Land Lock is a tent and shelter combination for up to four adults. Use it for family or friend group camping trips and never worry about space. The Land Lock features a spacious gathering area, a private inner tent for sleeping, and two expandable shade panels for additional living space. The Land Lock also features sealable mesh windows that allow for cross breezes during hot summer nights. Pair the Land Lock with the Landlock Inner Mat for a comfortable sleeping set-up.

description: The Land Nest Dome Medium is a well-ventilated and easily assembled 4-person tent. The flysheet has universal door openings, and the included inner tent can be attached to the front or back, allowing for a quick and easy set-up. The Land Nest Dome Tent Medium can be used in multiple ways: as a shelter without the inner tent, as a 4-person tent, and as a 1-person tent with the complementary Land Nest Dome Medium Solo Inner Tent . Please note: The Land Nest Dome Medium Solo Inner Tent is sold separately.

description: The Land Nest Shelter is a beginner-level shelter with living and sleeping spaces, providing enough space for a family of four. Based on the Land Nest Dome, the Land Nest Shelter has a symmetrical design and simple frame structure, making it easy to set up for campers of all experience levels. The inner tent can be removed to create a more spacious living area. The shelter material is designed with sun-blocking and temperature-regulating features, making it ideal for camping in any season.

description: The Land Nest Shelter in Ivory is a beginner-level shelter with living and sleeping spaces, providing enough space for a family of four. Based on the Land Nest Dome, the Land Nest Shelter in Ivory has a symmetrical design and simple frame structure, making it easy to set up for campers of all experience levels. The inner tent can be removed to create a more spacious living area. The shelter material is designed with sun-blocking and temperature-regulating features, making it ideal for camping in any season. The Land Nest Shelter in Ivory is made without intentionally added PFAS-based treatments and is designed to meet or exceed leading chemical safety standards.

description: The Land Nest Medium Tent Tarp Set is a 2-person tent and 4-person tarp set that is inclusive of the Land Nest Dome Small and the Land Nest Tarp Set to offer ample space for sleeping and gathering. The easily assembled 4-person tent includes a flysheet with universal door openings, and an inner tent can be attached to the front or back. The tarp allows for a large gathering area with wind and sun protection.

description: The Land Nest Tarp Set is a 4-person, hexagonal-shaped tarp that protects against outdoor elements. The set includes the tarp, poles, guylines, and pegs. The tarp allows for a large gathering area while providing wind and sun protection. Use the tarp on its own, or pair it with the Land Nest Dome Medium for a full set-up.

description: The Land Station is a dynamic tarp designed to accommodate up to eight people. With a variety of set-up options, the Land Station is a natural centerpiece in camp, whether for sleeping or gathering. The Land Station is designed to protect from the elements like wind and rain, and is made from a fabric that shelters from the sun, while still letting in light. Please note: Wing Poles are not included. Pair the Land Station with the Tarp Pole 210cm Aluminum and Wing Pole 140cm Aluminum for a complete set-up.

description: The Living Shell Long Pro is a modular shelter. Use the eye-catching Living Shell Long during group excursions for seamless integration of nature and the comforts of home. Prop up the front flap for an extended covered space for cooking or gathering. It features a spacious, floorless gathering space, temperate control skirt, triangular ventilation, UV shield protection, and rear panel docking.

description: The Long Bamboo Folding Shelf Light offers a multi-use bamboo surface supported by aluminum legs. Featuring a honeycomb-shaped internal structure, the surface offers strength and stability while significantly reducing weight. Use it as a narrow table, bench, or storage shelf. Intended for use at camp or at home, the Long Bamboo Folding Shelf Light can be set up by simply attaching the legs to the top by inserting them into notches.

description: The Lounge Cushion is a Japanese-designed ground seat for the campfield or home. Use it for ground-level dining or relaxing whether you’re camping, at the beach, or on the patio. The Lounge Cushion folds in half for elevated seating height and compact storage.

description: Designed in Japan, the Low Beach Chair has natural wood armrests and a canvas seat. The chair is stylish enough for the home or patio, but sturdy enough to withstand the rigors of camp. The Low Beach Chair features a high-quality wood armrest and back that is 7 inches taller than the Luxury Low Beach Chair . The Low Beach Chair folds into a compact case for efficient storage.

description: The Ofuton Warm Adapter in an insulating inner sleeping bag designed to be used with the Ofuton System products for enhanced warmth and comfort. Made from a polyester fleece material, the Ofuton Warm Adapter offers improved heat retention while also keeping your mat and comforter clean, and is machine washable for easy care in between uses. Four connection points on each side allow the Warm Adapter to seamlessly integrate with the System Ofuton products.

description: Made of lightweight aluminum, the Ozen Solo Table is a small rugged backpacking table. Use the Ozen Solo Table to keep food off the ground or as a small cooking surface. The Ozen Solo Table folds down flat and easily fits in a standard pack. Pair the Ozen Solo Table with the GigaPower Stove Manual for a backcountry cooking set-up.

description: The Penta Ease 1 in Ivory is an inner tent designed to pair with the Penta Tarp in Ivory and can also be used alone. The tent features a front panel divided by a vertical zipper, interior loops, and interior pockets. The front panel consists of water-resistant fabric layered with breathable mesh and rain cover to prevent rain from entering. Pair the Penta Ease 1 in Ivory with the Penta Tarp in Ivory and Light Tarp Pole for complete protection from weather elements. Note: the Light Tarp Pole 150cm is sold separately.

description: The Penta Tarp is a minimalist shelter for small groups. Use the Penta Tarp as an addition to floating trips or for camping on a river. Intended for use near the water, the Penta Tarp features a unique design that allows a paddle to be used as a pole. The Penta Tarp is durable, water-resistant, and compact - an easy addition to any excursion. Please note: Light Tarp Poles are not included. Pair the Penta Tarp with the Light Tarp Pole 150cm for set-up.

description: Designed in Japan, the Reclining Chair Wide has an aluminum frame, teak wood armrests, and a polyester mesh seat. The chair features an integrated headrest, a removable cushion, and a matching ottoman. The chair is stylish enough for the home or patio, but sturdy enough to withstand the rigors of camp. The Reclining Chair Wide offers four back positions, allowing it to recline almost flat for comfortable lounging. The chair and ottoman can be easily folded and secured for transportation and storage.

description: The Recta Tarp HD in Large features an advanced design for durable protection from sun and precipitation. The HD construction is engineered to more efficiently channel rainfall and withstand wind pressure. Shield processing applied to the fabric provides additional UV protection and shading, that can feel 2-4 degrees cooler than tarps without. Set it up for outdoor gatherings of up to 8 people. Poles and stakes are not included. We recommend two Wing Pole 240cm , four Aluminum Poles 170cm and eight Solid Stakes (sizes #30 and #40 work best). Shop the Recta Tarp HD Pro. Set in Large for the complete kit.

Pair the Red Folding Chair with the Red Folding Bench for a cohesive look.

description: Created as a foundational camping furniture setup for our Signature Series, the Red Lounge Set is exclusively available in the U.S. The set includes two Red Folding Chairs for durable, collapsible seating solutions, and the Renewed Bamboo My Table as a sleek, foldable table. Use the Entry IGT Table at home or outside for a low-height cooking and dining space. Use the Renewed Single Action Table Large for dining with groups of four to six in the garden or campground. The Renewed Single Action Table Large folds in half for compact storage inside its nylon carry case. Pair the Renewed Single Action Table Large with four Red Folding Chairs .

description: The Shelter Inner Duo is a versatile freestanding inner tent that can be used with a variety of shelters. The frame features connected joints, making it easy to set up. The included groundsheet can be attached to the base of the tent, allowing it to be moved and repositioned within the shelter as a single piece. The tent features a passthrough section for wing poles when used with the Land Station. Please note: the Shelter Inner Duo is designed to be used with a shelter and is not intended for standalone use. Four (4) pegs are required for setup, not included.

The Single Action Table Low Light folds into a thin panel for compact carrying and storage. Pair the Single Action Table Low Light with the Luxury Low Beach Chair for a complete set-up.

description: The System Ofuton & Slim Mat is an adjustable comforter and mattress system designed in the style of a Japanese futon, with added functionality for improved comfort at camp. The comforter is filled with hollow polyester fibers. It features six connection points for securing it to the mat, allowing the comforter to remain fixed in place for a comfortable night's sleep. Flaps on each side can be folded under before securing the straps, and a drawstring closure at the top of the bag can be tightened to maximize heat retention. The flaps can be secured at four points, on the top and bottom, for enhanced warmth and comfort.

Its rounded legs offer a stable base for any ground surface. The Takibi My Table features a packable and collapsible design, and a Stainless Steel Single Unit Tray can be inserted underneath to store additional items. Pair the Takibi My Table with the Red Folding Chair .

description: A US-exclusive, the Takibi Tarp Hexa Set M is designed to create fireside gatherings in every season. The waterproof, UV-blocking Ivory Hexa Tarp features an elegant curved shape. Use the tarp on its own or attach the flame-resistant Takibi Inner Roof to allow for fires underneath the tarp. Secure with the included 1.5mm Aluminum Wing Poles and store the full set in the ivory-colored carrying case. Explore our full Takibi line-up to build an ideal bonfire collection.

description: The Takibi Tarp Octa is a large Japanese-designed tarp with a fire-resistant liner. Use the Takibi Tarp Octa to enjoy campfires year-round and stay protected from the elements. The Takibi Tarp Octa features an elevated space that can easily fit eight people. The tarp is designed to offer maximum protection from wind and rain, while still featuring large openings for light. Pair the Takibi Tarp Octa with the Takibi Fire & Grill for a full fireside set-up. Please note: Wing Poles are not included and need to be purchased separately.

description: The Toya 2 is a ground canopy best for park picnics and backyards. The padded groundsheet offers water-resistant protection from damp grass. It features a fly sheet, frame, and groundsheet. Pair the Toya 2 with the Ground Panel Chair for a comfortable set-up. Please note: the Toya 2 is not suitable for overnight camping or during inclement weather.

description: The Vault in Ivory is a versatile four-person tent. Use it for car camping with groups for a comfortable sleeping and gathering solution. The tent can be converted into an open-air shelter by simply removing the inner lining. It also features a convenient side entrance and ample ventilation. Pair the Vault in Ivory with the Entry Pack TT Mat & Sheet Set for a comfortable sleeping space.
